falsification_conditions.condition: Price closes above $30,000 (2022 resistance level) with a 5% increase in 7 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A decisive breakout above a key historical resistance level would invalidate the HOLD by confirming a bullish trend contrary to the pattern's implied consolidation.

falsification_conditions.condition: Trading volume exceeds 200% of the 20-day average in any 3-day window
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Sustained extreme volume would indicate a confirmed breakout or blowoff move, directly contradicting the current indecision (HOLD) and pattern's implied low-liquidity environment.

falsification_conditions.condition: Blowoff score increases to 60+ within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A significant rise in blowoff score would confirm a high-pressure scenario, directly contradicting the current HOLD and suggesting a confirmed top rather than a bottom pattern.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
